title: Skill Handoff Schema
description: Standardized handoff format between product design AI agent skills.

source_skill.description: The ID of the skill producing the handoff (e.g., 'problem_framing_orchestrator').

target_skill.description: The ID of the downstream skill intended to receive this handoff.

summary.description: A concise summary of the work completed in the current phase.

key_decisions.description: Major decisions made, concepts selected, or constraints defined.

open_questions.description: Unresolved questions or areas needing confirmation in the next phase.

artifacts.description: Links or references to artifacts generated (e.g., UI Spec Guideline).
